subcodes.first_line: O Ghulam! Praise be to God that thou hast been enabled to attain unto the good-pleasure of the One True Friend and hast acted according to His command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غلام الحمد لله موفق شدید برضای دوست یکتا و عمل نمودید آنچه را که امر فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @purpose; goal of creation, @condition of search, @belief and denial, @attaining good pleasure of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @scarcity of receptive souls
